texto: If God wanted us to use the metric system, He would have given us ten fingers and ten toes.
explicacao: Citação de Judith Stone sobre temas ligados a fe. “If God wanted us to use the metric system, He would have given us ten fingers and ten toes.” articula fe, comedy, metric-system em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como metric-system.

texto: Try saying this: 'What's true for me today is that I have angry feelings concerning what I heard you say when you said what you said. It reminds me of what my mother said when she said what she said, and that hurts me so that's where I'm at with this, and it's not all right with me for today.' This should help to avoid a lot of communication problems.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Judith Stone sobre temas ligados a familia. A afirmação “Try saying this: 'What's true for me today is that I have angry feelings concerning what I heard …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a familia, communication, humor, útil em momentos de humor.
